introSection:
Treetops Rollercoaster is a steel roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Oakwood Theme Park in Narberth, Pembrokeshire, Wales, UK.

On 23 October 2022, an incident occurred on the coaster which resulted in a man being airlifted to hospital. The park was subsequently closed. The man's injuries were later revealed to be non-life threatening. Treetops Rollercoaster has since reopened. In February 2024, the Heath and Safety Executive closed its investigation after it found no fault with the ride hardware.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride follows the same double figure eight layout that other Tivoli Large models by Zierer follow.

fullText:
Treetops Rollercoaster is a steel roller coaster currently standing but not operating at Oakwood Theme Park in Narberth, Pembrokeshire, Wales, UK.

On 23 October 2022, an incident occurred on the coaster which resulted in a man being airlifted to hospital. The park was subsequently closed. The man's injuries were later revealed to be non-life threatening. Treetops Rollercoaster has since reopened. In February 2024, the Heath and Safety Executive closed its investigation after it found no fault with the ride hardware.

The ride follows the same double figure eight layout that other Tivoli Large models by Zierer follow.

Green track and supports.
